message:
fix(wolfram): allow http:// base_url for localhost testing and harden schema assertions

Allow http:// protocol prefix in base_url to support wiremock localhost
test servers instead of always prepending https://. Update tests to pass
full URIs instead of stripping protocol. Strengthen operation schema
assertions from is_some() to is_object() for more meaningful validation.
Use Duration::from_mins/from_secs for cleaner duration construction.
Add clippy allows for missing_errors_doc and too_many_lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
